testcase.name: EQ-02: explicit transitive edges should be redundant

failure.message: [Role ROLE_A permissions should be independent of string formatting] expected: ["ROLE_A"] but was: ["ROLE_C", "ROLE_A", "ROLE_B"]

testcase.name: EQ-10: Deep hierarchy should equal its flattened equivalent
testcase.system-out: >>> MR recorded: EQ-10 PASS (2ms) timestamp = 2026-04-06T18:01:23.385531, EquivalenceBasedMRs:EQ-10: Deep hierarchy should equal its flattened equivalent = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 3 | # of calls to property checks = 3 | # of not rejected calls generation = EXHAUSTIVE | parameters are exhaustively generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 0 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 0 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 4961070235575261263 | random seed to reproduce generated values
